basic_details.job_title: IIT Patna Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10 Junior Research Associate, Office Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Research Associate, Office Assistant and More
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Patna (IIT Patna) Research Positions under COIL-D Project Notification 2026 has been released on 25 May 2026. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Patna Research Positions under COIL-D Project Recruitment 2026. Candidates who possess B.Tech/B.E., MCA, M.Sc, B.A., M.A., M.Phil, PhD, MBA, B.Com, BCA, Diploma, or related qualifications as per the post requirement are eligible to apply for these vacancies. The application process for IIT Patna Research Positions under COIL-D Project Recruitment 2026 has already started, and interested candidate

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B. Tech./B.E. or MCA or M.Sc, B.A or M.A.or M.Phil./PhD or M.E./M.Tech./MBA, B.Com./B.Sc./BCA/Diploma
qualification.details: Junior Research Associate (Technical): B. Tech./B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering, Information Technology, AI and DS, Electronics/Electronics and Tele Communication/Electrical Engineering or MCA or M.Sc (Computer Science). Desirable: Experience of building systems in AI, ML and NLP. Exposures of creating and maintaining GUI, Webpages; and having knowledge for data management. Junior Research Associate Language: a) B.A. (Language or Linguistics) with 2 years of experience in the relevant area; or b) M.A. (Language or Linguistics) with exposure in the relevant area; or c) M.Phil./PhD in language or linguistics or in the related discipline. d) Knowledge in Hindi/Maithili/Odia/Bengali languages. Desirable: Exposure for parallel corpus creation, data annotation etc. Experience of working in a language technology project. Liaison Officer: a) M.Sc (Computer Science or related area)/MCA/ M.A. (Mass Communication) with 1 year of experience; or b) M.E./M.Tech./MBA. Desirable: Exposure in Language Technology related project. Experience of coordination in a project. Experience in public relationship. Office Assistant: a) B.Com./B.Sc./BCA/Diploma (with 1-year experience), or B. Tech./B.E. Desirable: Have proficiency in MS Word, Excel etc. Knowledge in Webpage design. Accounting will be preferable.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Junior Research Associate Language (Hindi-01, Maithili-01, Odia-02, Bangla-01)

salary_details.details: Junior Research Associate (Technical): Rs. 50,000/month with 10% annual increment, Rs. 45,000/month with 10% annual increment, Rs. 50,000/month with 10% annual increment, Rs. 30,000/month with 10% annual increment Junior Research Associate Language: Rs. 50,000/month with 10% annual increment, Rs. 45,000/month with 10% annual increment, Rs. 50,000/month with 10% annual increment, Rs. 30,000/month with 10% annual increment Liaison Officer: Rs. 50,000/month with 10% annual increment, Rs. 45,000/month with 10% annual increment, Rs. 50,000/month with 10% annual increment, Rs. 30,000/month with 10% annual increment Office Assistant: Rs. 50,000/month with 10% annual increment, Rs. 45,000/month with 10% annual increment, Rs. 50,000/month with 10% annual increment, Rs. 30,000/month with 10% annual increment

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Patna Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Patna Research Positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Patna Research Positions under the COIL-D Project is 10th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Research Positions?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies for various Research Positions under the COIL-D Project at IIT Patna. These include Junior Research Associate (Technical), Junior Research Associate Language, Liaison Officer, and Office Assistant posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application process for IIT Patna Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is via email. Candidates need to send their complete bio-data and required documents to the official email address specified in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary varies depending on the post. It ranges from Rs. 30,000/month to Rs. 50,000/month, with a 10% annual increment applicable to all positions.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications are diverse, ranging from B.Tech./B.E. and MCA to M.A. and M.Phil./PhD in relevant fields, depending on the specific post applied for.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for IIT Patna Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Online/Offline Interview. Candidates shortlisted based on their applications will be called for the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Which languages are covered under the Junior Research Associate Language post?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Associate Language positions cover Hindi, Maithili, Odia, and Bengali languages. There are specific vacancies for each language as indicated in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. Does IIT Patna offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify age limits or relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for any such information.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and website link?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the official website link are provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article for your convenience.
